title: aster macrocephalus
intro: Aster macrocephalus, also known as large-flowered Michaelmas daisy or Chinese daisy, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family (Asteraceae). This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are believed to aid in reducing fever and relieving pain. The health benefits of Aster macrocephalus include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve respiratory function, and support the immune system, although more research is needed to confirm these claims. In herbal preparations, the flowers, leaves, and stems of the plant are often dried and used as an ingredient in teas, infusions, and decoctions to leverage its medicinal properties.
